name: heady-system-build
description: Heady system bundle: 53 service implementations, 14 skill files, 11 app HTML surfaces, infra configs (Envoy/Consul/OTel/K8s), refactored orchestration artifacts, Drupal vector sync, central auth runtime, and build reports

sessions.summary: Built the complete Heady system bundle under /home/user/workspace/heady-system-build/. Includes: 53 service implementations with /health endpoints and AutoContext middleware (ports 8100-8907 plus heady-auth 8510), refactored swarm-coordinator/bee-factory/HCFullPipeline Stage 4 with ranking language removed and CSL domain routing only, Drupal webhook+polling vector sync service, 14 new skill SKILL.md files, central auth runtime and login surfaces, Envoy/Consul/OpenTelemetry/Kubernetes infra configs, and reports in /reports/.
